llm_summary.executive_summary: The rename from Customer_ID to Client_ID in the customer_360 table affects downstream KPI and reporting assets in the sales_dashboard and executive_kpi assets.
llm_summary.risk_rationale: The change impacts critical business reporting and KPI calculations, but only within the impacted DB tables and semantic models.
deployment_plan: 1. Update the column name CustomerID to Client_ID in the customer_360 table.
2. Refresh the semantic model measures that reference HighValueCustomer (customer_360).
3. Update definitions in the territory_performance table (TopTerritory, AvgRevenuePerCustomer, CustomerCount, TotalProfit, TotalRevenue) to use Client_ID.
validation_checklist: Verify CustomerID column renamed to Client_ID in customer_360.
Confirm High Value Customer Count, High Value Customer Revenue, and Customer Revenue Concentration % measures are recalculated.
Validate TopTerritory, AvgRevenuePerCustomer, CustomerCount, TotalProfit, TotalRevenue, and CustomerCount in territory_performance.
rollback_plan: Revert column name change in customer_360 to CustomerID.
Revert territory_performance column references to CustomerID.
_scrubbed_items: 4. Refresh the sales_dashboard and executive_kpi PowerBI reports.
Test the sales_dashboard for correct display of updated KPI values.
Review executive_kpi for HighestRevenueProduct and revenue-related KPIs.
Rollback PowerBI sales_dashboard and executive_kpi reports.
